member.name: M:FromDays(90)
member.summary: Default auto renew duration for accounts, contracts, topics, and files (entities)

member.name: T:Unknown
member.summary: Dummy account ID used to assist in deserializing incomplete Transactions.

member.name: M:WithValidStart(DUMMY_ACCOUNT_ID,DateTimeOffset.)
member.summary: Dummy transaction ID used to assist in deserializing incomplete Transactions.

member.name: M:FromBytes``1(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create the correct transaction from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:GenerateHash(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Generate a hash from a byte array.

member.name: M:AddTransactionToMap(Proto.Transaction,Proto.TransactionBody,DictionaryLinked{TransactionId,DictionaryLinked{AccountId,Proto.Transaction}})
member.summary: Add a transaction to the transaction map

member.name: M:CreateTransactionFromDataCase``1(Proto.TransactionBody.DataOneofCase,DictionaryLinked{TransactionId,DictionaryLinked{AccountId,Proto.Transaction}})
member.summary: Creates the appropriate transaction type based on the data case.

member.name: M:ProcessTransactionList(System.Collections.Generic.List{Proto.Transaction},DictionaryLinked{TransactionId,DictionaryLinked{AccountId,Proto.Transaction}})
member.summary: Process a list of transactions with integrity verification

member.name: M:FromScheduledTransaction``1(Proto.SchedulableTransactionBody)
member.summary: Create the correct transaction from a scheduled transaction.

member.name: M:ParseTransactionBody(ByteString)
member.summary: Parses the transaction body from a signed transaction bytestring.
member.returns: The parsed transaction body, or null if parsing fails

member.name: M:ParseTransactionBody(Proto.SignedTransaction)
member.summary: Parses the transaction body from a signed transaction builder.
member.returns: The parsed transaction body, or null if parsing fails

member.name: M:PrepareSingleTransaction(Proto.Transaction)
member.summary: Prepare a single transaction by ensuring it has SignedTransactionBytes
